mapper.select: SELECT id, event_code, name, point_amount, credit_amount, daily_cap, enabled, description, sort_order, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM reward_rule ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, event_code, name, point_amount, credit_amount, daily_cap, enabled, description, sort_order, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM reward_rule WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE reward_rule SET name = #{name}, point_amount = #{pointAmount}, credit_amount = #{creditAmount}, daily_cap = #{dailyCap}, enabled = #{enabled}, description = #{description}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, level, level_name, min_point, levelup_credit, levelup_coupon_code, benefit_note, active, created_at, updated_at FROM user_level_policy ORDER BY level ASC
SELECT id, level, level_name, min_point, levelup_credit, levelup_coupon_code, benefit_note, active, created_at, updated_at FROM user_level_policy WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_level_policy (level, level_name, min_point, levelup_credit, levelup_coupon_code, benefit_note, active) VALUES (#{level}, #{levelName}, #{minPoint}, #{levelupCredit}, #{levelupCouponCode}, #{benefitNote}, #{active})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_level_policy SET level = #{level}, level_name = #{levelName}, min_point = #{minPoint}, levelup_credit = #{levelupCredit}, levelup_coupon_code = #{levelupCouponCode}, benefit_note = #{benefitNote}, active = #{active} WHERE id = #{id}

where.if: AND (code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT id, code, name, discount_type, discount_value, min_purchase, valid_from, valid_until, max_issue, issued_count, enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM coupon
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT id, code, name, discount_type, discount_value, min_purchase, valid_from, valid_until, max_issue, issued_count, enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM coupon WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon (code, name, discount_type, discount_value, min_purchase, valid_from, valid_until, max_issue, enabled) VALUES (#{code}, #{name}, #{discountType}, #{discountValue}, #{minPurchase}, #{validFrom}, #{validUntil}, #{maxIssue}, #{enabled})
mapper.update: UPDATE coupon SET name = #{name}, discount_type = #{discountType}, discount_value = #{discountValue}, min_purchase = #{minPurchase}, valid_from = #{validFrom}, valid_until = #{validUntil}, max_issue = #{maxIssue}, enabled = #{enabled} WHERE id = #{id}

where.if: AND (u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR h.reason LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT h.id, h.user_id, u.email AS user_email, u.name AS user_name, h.event_code, h.point_delta, h.credit_delta, h.level_before, h.level_after, h.ref_type, h.ref_id, h.reason, h.created_at FROM user_reward_history h JOIN users u ON u.id = h.user_id
ORDER BY h.created_at DESC, h.id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_reward_history h JOIN users u ON u.id = h.user_id
